notes: Captured Admin GraphQL 2026-04 delivery-profile write evidence covers blank-name validation, nested profile create, nested update with location add, method update/create, condition delete, variant dissociation, missing-id userErrors, default-profile removal denial, asynchronous remove job payload, and downstream profile absence after removal.
